items.title: xAI fired an engineer who raised alarms about Grok safety, new lawsuit claims
items.summary: A former xAI engineer is suing the company and SpaceX, alleging he was fired for raising AI safety concerns about Grok days before SpaceX's historic IPO.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Canada announces bill banning social media for anyone under 16
items.summary: The regulation also imposes new safety expectations on 'AI chatbot services.'
